title: Celestial 16x
description: A vanilla edit PVP resource pack for all your PvP needs! Enhances PvP with recoloured diamonds/netherite and 3d endcrystals! Includes quality of life features such as no explosion particles.
body:
A vanilla PvP recolour for all your PvP needs. The purpose of this resource pack is to enchance and make PvP more colourful. Currently the only recolour is pink. More recolours will come in the future.

## Features: 
-  No pumpkin blur
-  3d endcrystals (item)
-  Recoloured diamond and netherite armor/weapons/tools
-  Smoother endcrystal (entity/block)
- No explosion particles
- Custom Golden apple/carrot texture
- Totem animation

## Coming soon:
- Low fire
- Low shield
- More diamond/netherite recolours
- Small utilities
- Animations for items (pearls, wind charges)
